title: Car Boot Organiser with Cooler Bag, Extra Large Premium Expandable Compartments, Foldable Car Organiser, Trunk Organiser for Most Vehicles & Indoor
features: Sturdy Material & Stable Structure: The outer layer of this trunk organizer is made of 600D water-repellent Oxford polyester, which is durable and easy to clean. The inner layer is made of 2.5mm PE sheets instead of cardboard to ensure long-lasting durability even after soaking. Additional floor plates ensure that the trunk organizer remains stable during use.

Large Capacity & Multiple Compartments: The full dimensions are 32.3x14x11.8in, with a large capacity of 88 liters. This trunk organizer features a multi-compartment design with 3 main compartments, 9 mesh pockets and 2 side pockets. You can design the compartments by adjusting the 4 removable dividers to store different items and keep them perfectly separated from each other.

Removable lid and adhesive strip fastener: One car organizer provides a full lid that can protect your loads from dust or rainwater; more importantly, it protects your privacy. In addition, the car trunk bag has 2 adhesive strips on the bottom, and it does not slip excessively on the floor.

Comfortable Carry Handles & Strap Fasteners: Unlike other handles that can dig into your hands, our comfortable kayak handles are comfortable to use even when heavily loaded. Optional strap fasteners tighten like a cargo net to hook onto your seatback or back seat child seat anchor, keeping your belongings securely in place.

Easy to Use, Install and Clean: It is really easy to install and fold this cargo storage bag. When you finish using it, you can fold it completely and it takes up less space. Don't forget to take it with you when you go shopping or to the supermarket. It is helpful and environmentally friendly. If you want to clean it, simply wipe the surface with a damp cloth.
description: Product Description REASON FOR CHOOSING EINESIN With solid, water-resistant PP floor plates as a base, this trunk organizer is easy to clean and waterproof. Sturdy walls and a firm base plate help maintain the shape of the car organizer. DETAIL PRESENTATION FOLDABLE DESIGN - Folds up when not in use Versatile Use Groceries, first aid kits, tools, picnics, pet supplies, cleaning supplies, sports equipment, books, children's toys, and other items you need to store in your vehicle.
